nasb.text: Immediately he regained his sight and began following Him, glorifying God; and when all the people saw it, they gave praise to God.

esv.text: And immediately he recovered his sight and followed him, glorifying God. And all the people, when they saw it, gave praise to God.

cnv.text: 他立刻看見了，就跟隨耶穌，頌讚　神。眾人看見這事，也讚美　神。

ccb.text: 他立刻得见光明，并跟随耶稣，一路赞美上帝。目睹这事的人也都赞美上帝。

csbs.text: 他立刻重见光明，于是跟随耶稣，一路上荣耀神。民众都看到了，就赞美神。
